<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>🎮 2048</title>
<style>
body { text-align: center; font-family: Arial; }
.grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 80px); gap: 5px; justify-content: center; }
.cell {
  width: 80px; height: 80px;
  background: #ccc;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h2>2048</h2>
<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>

<script>
let grid = Array(16).fill(0);

function draw() {
  const g = document.getElementById("grid");
  g.innerHTML = "";
  grid.forEach(v => {
    let d = document.createElement("div");
    d.className = "cell";
    d.innerText = v || "";
    g.appendChild(d);
  });
}

function random() {
  let empty = grid.map((v,i)=>v===0?i:null).filter(v=>v!=null);
  if (empty.length === 0) return;
  grid[empty[Math.floor(Math.random()*empty.length)]] = 2;
}

function moveLeft() {
  for (let r=0;r<4;r++){
    let row = grid.slice(r*4,r*4+4).filter(v=>v);
    for(let i=0;i<row.length-1;i++){
      if(row[i]===row[i+1]){
        row[i]*=2;
        row[i+1]=0;
      }
    }
    row = row.filter(v=>v);
    while(row.length<4) row.push(0);
    for(let i=0;i<4;i++) grid[r*4+i]=row[i];
  }
}

document.addEventListener("keydown", e=>{
  if(e.key==="ArrowLeft"){
    moveLeft();
    random();
    draw();
  }
});

random(); random();
draw();
</script>

</body>
</html>
